Itaconix PLC
10 June 2026
For immediate release
ITACONIX PLC
("Itaconix" or the "Company")
Result of Annual General Meeting
Itaconix plc (AIM: ITX) (OTCQB: ITXXF), a leading innovator in high-performance plant-based specialty polymers, announces that all resolutions set out in the Notice of Annual General Meeting circulated to shareholders were duly passed at the Annual General Meeting held earlier today.
A full copy of the results will be available on the Company's website at
www.itaconix.com/investor-resources
.

About Itaconix
Itaconix uses its proprietary plant-based polymer technology platform to produce and sell specialty ingredients that improve the safety, performance, and sustainability of consumer products. The Company's current ingredients are enabling and leading new generations of cost-effective, decarbonized consumer products in home and personal care.

latest.title: Mello 2026 Presentation and Update on Trading
latest.content:
2 Jun 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 5423G
Itaconix PLC
02 June 2026
Embargoed for 07.00, 2 June
2026
ITACONIX PLC
("Itaconix" or the "Company")
Mello 2026 Conference Presentation and Update on Trading
Extending Plant-Based Innovation into New Markets
Itaconix plc (AIM: ITX) (OTCQB: ITXXF), a leading innovator in high-performance plant-based specialty polymers, will present today at 13.55 BST at Mello 2026 Investor Conference.
Following our most successful year to date in FY2025, the Company reports that trading in the current year has continued in line with the Board's expectations. The management expects H1 FY2026 will be another record half. The Board remains confident in the Company's strategy, customer pipeline and long-term growth opportunities.
Our core Itaconix® Performance Ingredients business continues to build momentum in consumer detergent applications for scale inhibition and odour neutralisation, supported by increasing customer adoption of safer, higher-performing and more sustainable ingredients. We continue to see encouraging activity levels from major customers and are closely tracking reorder rates from new customers to assess expected growth in 2026.
The Middle Eastern conflicts are creating disruptions in the production and supply of fossil-based specialty chemicals that compete against our ingredients. The Company continues to monitor logistics and transportation costs within our plant-based supply chain which have not experienced significant disruption or unfavourable cost implications, and our overall gross profit margins remain steady. Current and potential customers are recognising the stability in the supply and pricing of our ingredients, which we believe will translate into new revenue opportunities.
Driving Growth Through Innovation
In May 2026, the Company announced the launch of its new deeperclean.com marketing initiative aimed at North American consumer detergent brand owners. The flagship product on deeperclean.com is the 8 grams plant-based dishwashing detergent tablet that Itaconix introduced at the American Cleaning Institute's Innovation Showcase in February this year. The ecommerce site allows brand and formulation managers to readily receive and evaluate the novel performance and marketing claims available with our ingredients. We expect to conduct consumer evaluations to test, refine and substantiate the performance of our formulations.
In May 2026, the Company also announced the development of a new class of paints under the Company's BIO*Asterix® programme. During this next stage of development, the Company will work with an established specialty paint company to evaluate paint products using these new esters and latexes.
In June 2026, the Company announced evaluation agricultural trials of new potential applications for our current ingredients in crop production under the tradename BioVail™ GRZ™ 200L. Results of these trials are expected at after harvest. This work will require assessment over multiple growing seasons.
- Ends -

latest.title: Progress in Crop Production Field Trials
latest.content:
1 Jun 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 3241G
Itaconix PLC
01 June 2026
For release on Reach: 1 June 2026
Itaconix plc
("Itaconix", the "Company" or the "Group")
Progress in Crop Production Field Trials for Plant-Based Polymers
Itaconix plc (AIM: ITX) (OTCQB: ITXXF), a leading innovator in high-performance plant-based specialty polymers used in consumer products, announces progress in its ongoing assessment of crop production applications for its polymer technologies.
The Company has evaluated the potential use of its existing polymers in crop production periodically over the past 15 years. The commercial goal is for the polymers to improve the uptake and use of nutrients in plants during their growth cycle. Prior work with potential collaboration partners and small-scale internal studies have indicated some potential for achieving this goal.
Itaconix is evaluating a promising polymer this growing season with field trials in the United States under the tradename BioVail™ GRZ™ 200L. The Company is working directly with a small number of farms to assess the growth benefits from the application of BioVail GRZ 200L on corn crops. Full quantification of plant growth results is expected after harvest.
If the results show potential benefits, then the Company will progressively increase the size and scope of trials over the next few years to confirm and substantiate claims to support full commercial efforts.
John R. Shaw, CEO of Itaconix, commented:
"Our polymer technologies have long shown technical potential beyond our core consumer product markets, including applications in crop production. Early work suggested there may be opportunities to improve plant growth through nutrient delivery and uptake within plants. These initial field trials are an important next step in evaluating performance under real agricultural conditions. While this work remains at an early stage and will require assessment over multiple growing seasons, we are encouraged to expand our understanding of the broader capabilities of our plant-based polymers."
- Ends -

latest.title: Development of Next Generation Plant-Based Paints
latest.content:
29 May 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 1349G
Itaconix PLC
29 May 2026
For release on Reach: 29 May 2026
Itaconix plc
("Itaconix", the "Company" or the "Group")
Itaconix Advances Development of Next Generation Plant-Based Paints
Itaconix plc (AIM: ITX) (OTCQB: ITXXF), a leading innovator in high-performance plant-based specialty polymers used in consumer products,
announces further progress in the development of a new class of paints enabled by Itaconix's line of BIO*Asterix® ingredients.
The Company has filed a patent application covering paint formulations incorporating BIO*Asterix® ingredients and has also filed a trademark application relating to the new class of paints under development.
As part of the next stage of development activities, Itaconix has signed an agreement with an established specialty paint company to support the completion and evaluation of initial paint products using BIO*Asterix® ingredients.
The programme forms part of the Company's broader strategy to expand the application of its plant-based polymer platform into new application categories, with a strong focus on product safety, performance, and sustainability.
John R. Shaw, CEO of Itaconix, commented:
"We believe our
BIO*Asterix® ingredients
can enable a new and differentiated class of paints with compelling safety and sustainability characteristics. Protecting our proprietary space with this class of paints and collaborating with an experienced industry partner are important next steps in developing and assessing our long-term potential in paint and coating applications. While still at an early stage, we are encouraged by the advances we are making and look forward to further evaluating the opportunity over time."
- Ends -

latest.title: Launch of New Marketing Program for Detergents
latest.content:
27 May 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 7800F
Itaconix PLC
27 May 2026
For release on RNS Reach: May 27, 2026
Itaconix plc
("Itaconix", the "Company" or the "Group")
Launch of New Marketing Program for Next Generation Consumer Detergents
Itaconix plc (AIM: ITX) (OTCQB: ITXXF), a leading innovator in high-performance plant-based specialty polymers used in consumer products, today announces its new deeperclean.com marketing initiative aimed at North American consumer detergent brand owners.
Deeperclean.com is a North American ecommerce site that offers brand managers ready access to the commercial potential of next generation detergent products enabled by Itaconix® technologies. The Company currently promotes dishwashing and laundry detergent formulations through its SPARX™ Formulated Solution programme. Management's assessment of this programme's success identified opportunities to further accelerate the adoption of new formulations. Interested brand managers can easily order and receive fully packaged detergents with the certainty of performance, marketing claims, and pricing needed to speed product evaluation and purchasing decisions.
The flagship product on deeperclean.com is the 8-gram plant-based dishwashing detergent tablet that Itaconix introduced at the American Cleaning Institute's Innovation Showcase in February.
Although the site is intended primarily for brand managers, the Company expects some retail sales that will generate valuable consumer data to use with brand managers and to assist with future product development.
All orders are handled via a third-party logistics company in the US. Fulfillment to retail customers in the UK is available but will not reflect competitive cost potential due to high shipping charges.
John R. Shaw, CEO of Itaconix, commented:
"Our ingredients are enabling new dishwashing and laundry detergents with improved safety, performance, affordability, and sustainability. We see deeperclean.com as new, more tangible and effective way for brand managers to experience the commercial potential of products enabled by Itaconix technologies. By making it easier to evaluate fully formulated products with proven performance and positioning, we believe this initiative can help accelerate the adoption of next generation detergents. I look forward to reporting on the progress and growth of deeperclean.com over the next few years."
- Ends -

company_30s.what_they_do: Itaconix is a specialty chemical firm that creates plant‑based paints, coatings and detergents aimed at the growing eco‑friendly market. They focus on low‑to‑zero‑VOC products for industrial and consumer use.
company_30s.why_they_matter: The global paint and coatings sector is shifting toward sustainable, non‑toxic solutions. Itaconix’s plant‑derived formulations give it a competitive edge in markets that are tightening environmental regulations and consumer demand for greener products.
company_30s.current_state: The company is in a rebuild phase, rolling out new product lines and marketing programmes while still working to generate consistent revenue. It trades at a very low price relative to its asset base, signalling a distressed but potentially undervalued position.

rns_narrative: Itaconix is actively launching a next‑generation line of plant‑based paints and has announced a new marketing push for its detergent range, signalling a focus on product innovation.
Corporate governance updates – director changes, AGM adjournments and option grants – suggest management is aligning the board and capital structure to support the turnaround.
Financial reporting is in full swing with quarterly results and a full‑year update, providing a clearer picture of cash flow and revenue trends.

crowd_tape.dominant_theme: Quiet optimism around green innovation, but no sustained chatter.
crowd_tape.bull_narrative: Bulls point to the plant‑based paint launch and the fresh marketing program as catalysts that could unlock upside.
crowd_tape.bear_narrative: Bears flag uncertainty over whether the market will adopt the new products, the lack of current revenue, and the recent board changes.
crowd_tape.sentiment_shift: The mood is largely muted; sporadic bullish posts appear but there is no sustained community debate.

whats_happening_now.attention_check: Google Trends is flat – the public is not yet talking about the stock, which creates a prime window for surprise upside if a catalyst hits.

near_term_catalysts: Official launch of the next‑generation plant‑based paint line and the first sales data.
Announcement of a partnership or distribution agreement that expands market reach.
Quarterly earnings release that beats analyst expectations or shows a clear revenue uptick.
A spike in trading volume on the day of any of the above events.
expect_next.watch_for: Look for volume exceeding the 20‑day average, price touching the 50‑day moving‑average support, a positive earnings surprise, or a partnership deal that expands the product portfolio.
expect_next.timing_regime: The stock appears to be in the early stages of a post‑crash bottom. The APEX score indicates tight compression, signalling that a mean‑reversion bounce could materialise soon if any of the catalysts materialise.

buy_vs_sell.bull_case: The company sits at a deep discount and is now rolling out green‑innovation products that are in high demand. If the price recovers to 50% of its pre‑crash level, that is a 50% upside; a full bounce to the previous high would double the current price, a 100% gain. The historical performance of deep‑crash signals suggests that large rebounds are possible once a catalyst arrives.
buy_vs_sell.bear_case: If the new paint line fails to capture market share or if the company struggles to generate revenue, the stock could stay at or below its current low. The worst‑case loss is the current price, which is already minimal, but the upside potential would be capped if the product fails to gain traction.
buy_vs_sell.risk_reward: Potential upside of 50–100% against a downside limited to the current price. The asymmetry is roughly 1:2 to 1:3 in favour of the upside.

playbook.if_bullish: Enter when the price bounces off the 50‑day moving‑average support and volume spikes above the 20‑day average. Size the position at 5–10% of portfolio, set a stop 10% below the support level to protect against a false break.
playbook.if_watching: Wait for a clear catalyst – product launch, partnership announcement, or earnings beat – and a corresponding volume surge. Only enter after the price confirms support and volume supports the move.
playbook.if_passing: None identified. No evidence of delisting, bankruptcy or fraud.

ai_insights.bottom_line: Itaconix sits at a deep discount with a green‑innovation focus; a quiet market and a strong product launch could trigger a surprise bounce, offering a highly asymmetric upside.
